## Type

- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, wrong code/formula)
- [ ] Content update (expanded explanation, new example)
- [ ] New article
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Placement prep (PYQ, mock, resource)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code examples compile / run
- [ ] Links are valid (no 404s)
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly on GitHub preview
- [ ] Content matches the repo's "code-first, from-scratch" tone
- [ ] No paid promotions
